descriptions: Rosa dei Venti split from SCU due to conflicts with Rogoli, with permission from 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La Rosa dei venti prese vita nel carcere di Lecce nel 1990 da Giovanni De Tommasi, Cosimo Cirfeta e Vincenzo Stranieri che richiesero il permesso alla 'Ndrangheta di staccarsi dalla Sacra Corona Unita per contrasti avuti con Rogoli

descriptions: Rosa dei Venti formed from an internal division in SCU.
edges.evidence_quote: Rosa dei Venti : formed in 1990 by De Tommasi in the Lecce prison, following an internal division in the SCU.

descriptions: The Yellow Flag Army was used by the Anamese as a check against the Black Flag Army, indicating rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: The Anamese subsidized the Yellow Flags partly to act as a check upon the troublesome Black Flags

descriptions: Sin City Mafia is described as BMF's sister organization, indicating a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: They traced the last number called in Gatling's phone to Jerry Davis, leader of BMF's supposed sister organization , the Sin City Mafia.

descriptions: Roadburners members joined the Blue Angels after gang wars ended.
edges.evidence_quote: Members of the Roadburners and Garthamlock Blackhawks gangs subsequently joined the Blue Angels.

White Tigers.description: The White Tigers were a Chinese American street gang based in New York City's Flushing, Queens, and northern Chinatown. Formed in 1980 by Cantonese and Taiwanese immigrants and American-born Chinese, they engaged in extortion, kidnapping, drug trafficking, and murder. Active from the early 1980s to the mid-1990s, they fought turf wars with rival gangs like the Green Dragons.

descriptions: MOD overtook the White Tigers.
edges.evidence_quote: one of Minnesota's first Hmong gang known as the White Tigers was eventually overtaken by MOD's presence in the Twin Cities.

descriptions: Ghost Shadows allowed White Tigers to operate in their territory.
edges.evidence_quote: The White Tigers did have territory in upper Chinatown in Manhattan, on Mott Street, with permission from the Ghost Shadows

descriptions: White Tigers fought turf wars with Green Dragons.
edges.evidence_quote: Throughout the 80s, the gang was often engaged in bloody turf wars with other Queens gangs, such as the younger Green Dragons.

descriptions: Townsmen 13 is a rival of Puente 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Townsmen 13

Almighty Gaylords Nation.description: The Almighty Gaylords Nation is a European American street gang founded in Chicago in 1952. It is part of the People Nation alliance and is known for controlling territory in Chicago's West Town, Noble Square, and Kilbourn Park areas. The gang has been involved in extortion, assault, gun trafficking, and murder, and at its peak in 1979 had around 1,500 members. It remains active with an estimated 1,000–2,000 members across multiple states.

descriptions: 12th Street Players are listed as allies of the Gaylords in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: People Nation , Latin Kings , Insane South Side Popes , 12th Street Players, Indiana Aryan Brotherhood, Vice Lords , Latin Brothers

descriptions: Insane North Side Popes are listed as rivals of the Gaylords in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Folk Nation , Insane Deuces, Simon City Royals , Insane Spanish Cobras , Maniac Latin Disciples , C-Notes, Insane North Side Popes

edges.evidence_quote: Among their earliest rivals were the C-Notes, Lazy Gents, and Playboys.

Honoured Society (Australia).description: The Honoured Society is a Calabrian 'ndrangheta criminal confederation active in Australia, founded around 1920 in Melbourne. It controls Italian-Australian organized crime along the East Coast, involved in racketeering, drug trafficking, and other illegal activities. The organization has been marked by internal power struggles and conflicts such as the Market Wars. It remains active with multiple 'ndrine (crime families) operating across Australia.

descriptions: Tehrik-e-Khilafat Khorasan merged into ISIS–K in January 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: These groups were Tehrik-e-Khilafat Khorasan (TKK), Khilafat Afghan and Muslim Dost's group, Azizullah Haqqani's group, and Tehrik-e-Khilafat Pakistan (TKP)

descriptions: TKK merged to form ISIS–K.
edges.evidence_quote: ISIS–K, when it was officially declared in January 2015, was the product of the merger of Tehrik-e Khilafat Khorasan (TKK), Khilafat Afghan, Muslim Dost's group, Azizullah Haqqani's group, and Tehrik-e Khilafat Pakistan (TKP)

Latin Eagles.description: The Latin Eagles are a Puerto Rican street gang founded in Chicago, Illinois in 1964. Originally formed as a club to protect against white greaser gangs, it evolved into a criminal organization. The gang is known for spawning the Young Lords political group in the late 1960s. They are aligned with the Folk Nation and have been active continuously since their founding.

descriptions: Latin Eagles were part of Folk Nation alliance with Ashland Vikings.
edges.evidence_quote: the prison Folks alliance of Larry Hoover and his Black Gangster Disciples, Simon City Royals, Ashland Vikings, Latin Disciples and others

descriptions: Latin Eagles are rivals of Gangster Disciples.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Gangster Disciples

descriptions: Latin Eagles and Gangster Disciples went to war in 1995.
edges.evidence_quote: A war involving the Latin Eagles and the Gangster Disciples started in the summer of 1995

descriptions: Latin Eagles joined Folk Nation alliance alongside Black Gangster Disciples.
edges.evidence_quote: The Latin Eagles became enemies of all People gangs when they joined the prison Folks alliance of Larry Hoover and his Black Gangster Disciples

descriptions: Latin Eagles fought Harrison Gents for control of Lakeview High School.
edges.evidence_quote: The Latin Eagles, Latin Kings and Harrison Gents all fought for control of Lakeview High School

descriptions: Latin Eagles allied with Imperial Gangsters as part of Almighty Folks Familia.
edges.evidence_quote: the Almighty Latin Eagles formed an alliance with the Almighty Imperial Gangsters and Simon City Royals as the Almighty Folks Familia

edges.evidence_quote: disputes over Northside turf made the Latin Eagles mortal enemies with the Latin Kings

edges.evidence_quote: they would go into a permanent bloody war with the Insane Familia led by the Spanish Cobras and the Maniac Famila ran by the Maniac Latin Disciples

edges.evidence_quote: the prison Folks alliance of Larry Hoover and his Black Gangster Disciples, Simon City Royals, Ashland Vikings, Latin Disciples and others

descriptions: Latin Eagles are rivals of People Nation.

descriptions: Latin Eagles allied with Simon City Royals as part of Almighty Folks Familia.
edges.evidence_quote: the Almighty Latin Eagles formed an alliance with the Almighty Imperial Gangsters and Simon City Royals as the Almighty Folks Familia

descriptions: Latin Eagles went to war with Spanish Cobras after a party dispute.
edges.evidence_quote: This was the beginning of the Spanish Cobra-Latin Eagle conflict.

descriptions: Latin Eagles were allied with Spanish Cobras as part of ULO and Folk Nation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Latin Eagles became enemies of all People gangs when they joined the prison Folks alliance ... On the street, The Latin Eagles were members of ULO ... and became Folks alongside their ULO brothers; the Latin Disciples, Spanish Cobras, and Imperial Gangsters.

descriptions: Latin Eagles followed Latin Disciples into Folks Alliance, indicating cooperation.

descriptions: ISIS–K formed an alliance with Pakistani Jundullah.
edges.evidence_quote: the newly ordained ISIS–K forged significant alliances with other Sunni jihadist movements in the region to include the Islamic Movement of Uzbekistan (IMU), Islamic Movement of Turkmenistan (IMT), Uyghur East Turkestan Islamic Party (ETIP), Jamaat Ansarullah, Harakat Islami Tajikistan, and the Islamic Jihad Renaissance Party of Tajikistan (IJRPT), Hezb-e Islami Gulbuddin, and Balochi militant groups including the Pakistani Jundullah movement and Iranian Jundullah movement

edges.evidence_quote: Affiliations: Rise Above Movement

'Ndrina Di Giovine.description: The 'Ndrina Di Giovine is a Calabrian 'Ndrangheta clan based in Reggio Calabria, with branches in northern Italy (Milan) and abroad (United States). It engages in drug and arms trafficking. Women, notably Maria Serraino, have played a leading role in the clan's history. The clan was involved in heroin trafficking from Milan in the 1970s and later expanded into hashish and cocaine.

descriptions: Di Giovine is a sub-unit of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Di Giovine è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese di Reggio Calabria

descriptions: Di Giovine collaborated with Morabito to buy heroin and hashish.
edges.evidence_quote: Nell'aprile del 1994 i Di Giovine in collaborazione con la cosca dei Morabito comprarono eroina dalla Siria, e hashish dal Marocco.

descriptions: Di Giovine collaborated with the Gallo clan for drug importation.
edges.evidence_quote: L'importazione di sostanze stupefacenti avviene in collaborazione con il clan camorrista dei Gallo di Torre Annunziata

descriptions: The Serraino and Di Giovine were involved together in drug trafficking operations in Milan.
edges.evidence_quote: Ma hanno collegamenti molto radicati anche a Milano , dove si sono svolte le operazioni Belgio 1 , Belgio 2 e Belgio 3 che li vedevano coinvolti insieme ad altre cosche, tra cui i Di Giovine e i Musolino.

descriptions: Serraino and Di Giovine were jointly involved in operations Belgio 1, 2, and 3 in Milan.
edges.evidence_quote: Ma hanno collegamenti molto radicati anche a Milano , dove si sono svolte le operazioni Belgio 1 , Belgio 2 e Belgio 3 che li vedevano coinvolti insieme ad altre cosche, tra cui i Di Giovine e i Musolino.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Eight Trey Gangster Crips

descriptions: Ansar Al-Sharia is allied with AQAP, as Tariq Al-Fadhli mediated between them.

descriptions: Ansar Al-Sharia is a subsidiary of AQAP.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Compton Varrio Largo 36

edges.evidence_quote: The Morabitos also maintain strong ties with the Maisano, Pansera, Versace, Zappia, Mollica, Criaco, and Scriva 'ndrine.

descriptions: Both were main rebel groups supported by Turkey.
edges.evidence_quote: Ahrar al-Sham and Jaysh al-Islam were the main rebel groups supported by Turkey

descriptions: Ahrar al-Sham and Jaysh al-Islam co-signed a request to IS leader.
edges.evidence_quote: the group alongside the al-Nusra Front and Jaysh al-Islam co-signed a request asking the Islamic State's leader Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi to mediate a dispute over an oil field

descriptions: Al-Nusra was allied with Jaysh al-Islam until 2016.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Jaysh al-Islam (until 2016)

descriptions: Jaysh al-Islam criticized ISIL for killing Muslims.
edges.evidence_quote: The Jaysh al-Islam group within the Islamic Front criticised ISIL, saying: 'They killed the people of Islam and leave the idol worshippers ... They use the verses talking about the disbelievers and implement it on the Muslims'.
